name: agent-wallet
description: Codex plugin bridge for the AgentLayer wallet runtime.

interface.shortDescription: Use the local AgentLayer wallet runtime directly in Codex
interface.longDescription: Agent Wallet adds the existing local AgentLayer wallet runtime to Codex without creating a new wallet. It reuses the current OpenClaw runtime, keeps secrets local, and exposes the same Solana, Bitcoin, EVM, x402, Jupiter, Kamino, LI.FI, Bags, and Flash Trade tool surface through a Codex-native MCP bridge.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use my existing AgentLayer wallet here in Codex, preview wallet writes first, and execute only after explicit confirmation.
